recent_calls.summary: The user, Jody, reported that their AC unit is not turning on and keeps tripping the breaker. They requested service for Tuesday at their home in Alton, Illinois, and expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs. The agent confirmed the details and assured that the team would contact Jody to confirm the appointment and provide maintenance program information.

The user, Jody, initiated a call to Budget's after-hours assistant but did not provide any details about their request. The agent attempted to engage the user to understand the nature of the help needed but the user did not respond further and hung up.
The user, Clint, called Budget's after-hours assistant but did not clearly communicate a request. The agent attempted to engage, but the call ended shortly after without resolution.

The user, Hardikkumar, called after hours to request immediate assistance for a non-working AC unit covered under their service order. The agent explained that live agents are unavailable after hours but assured the issue would be marked as high priority and addressed on the next business day. The user acknowledged and ended the call after receiving this information.

The user called about an urgent issue related to an existing service order at 1279 Gilbert Lane and requested to speak with a live agent. The after-hours assistant explained that live agents or technicians were not available at this time but offered to relay the urgent request to the team for the next business day. The call ended without the user providing details of the urgent issue.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Aubrey, called after hours and expressed frustration about not receiving a specific time from a previous representative. The agent explained that they cannot confirm a time after hours but offered to take details for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended shortly after without further resolution.

Heidi called Budget's after-hours service to inquire about the status of a claim regarding a broken piece at her home. The agent explained that real-time updates are not available after-hours but assured that the team would follow up on the next business day. Heidi also asked about the usual response time for claim updates.

Betty called to request plumbing service during after-hours. The agent was unable to connect her to a live representative but documented her request and assured her a callback on the next business day. The call included some unclear and emotional dialogue, but the agent remained patient and supportive throughout.

The user called to schedule a follow-up appointment related to heating and cooling, specifically for central air. The user mentioned that the repair is done but did not specify further details or confirm the follow-up purpose. The call ended without completing the scheduling process.

The user, Patricia Yawn, called to report an emergency air conditioning outage in her home, which has been without AC since Thursday during a heat wave, with an immunocompromised person present. The agent documented the emergency and informed her that because it was after hours, a technician could not be dispatched immediately, but the team would call her back on the next business day. Patricia expressed frustration about the discrepancy in advertised Saturday hours and requested a callback by phone.
The user briefly interacted with the after-hours assistant but did not engage in a meaningful conversation or request any services. The call ended shortly after the initial greetings.
The call was very brief and disconnected shortly after the agent introduced themselves and the user began to speak.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves and asking for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The call was very brief and the user did not provide any clear information or request. The agent introduced herself and asked how she could help, but the user did not respond intelligibly and hung up shortly after.

The user called to pay a service request for an address, but the agent did not have billing access and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance. The call was transferred successfully to the appropriate department.
The user called regarding a message about their appointment. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to request an AC check service through American Home Shield and provided all necessary details including the dispatch number, service address, and contact information. The agent confirmed the information and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called Budget but was looking for American Home Shield. The agent clarified the company and offered assistance, but the user requested to be connected back to American Home Shield. The agent successfully transferred the call to American Home Shield.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to schedule an appointment for a home warranty service through American Home Shield. The agent collected the user's full name, role as property owner, and the service address but the call ended before the service type was confirmed or the appointment was completed.

The user, Trisha, called to book a maintenance check for her air conditioning unit directly with Budget. The agent confirmed her availability preferences and successfully booked an appointment for July 1st at 2 PM. The user provided positive feedback about the ease of booking on a Saturday afternoon.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak to an operator, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Rick Roy called to schedule an AC service appointment for Tuesday at 8 AM due to low refrigerant. The agent confirmed the details, booked the appointment, and received positive feedback from Rick regarding the accuracy of the service. The call concluded successfully with the appointment provisionally booked and the user satisfied.

Rick called to request an appointment for air conditioner service, specifically needing coolant. The agent provided available appointment slots for June 30th, but Rick decided to call back later to schedule. The agent confirmed the details and left the scheduling open for Rick to follow up.

Barbara called to reschedule a canceled appointment for a leaking water heater. The agent booked her for the soonest available slot on Monday, June 29th, from 4 to 6 PM, and Barbara confirmed the booking. She provided positive feedback about the quick service.

The user, Barbara Henson, called to schedule a standard plumbing appointment for a leaking hot water heater installed in 2020. The agent provisionally booked an appointment for Monday at 2 PM and confirmed the user's contact details and service address. The user provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user, Jennifer, returned a phone call and was promptly transferred by the agent Sophie to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user, Jerry, called to inform about a parts delivery and that he was at the property waiting to drop off the part. The agent confirmed the details and assured Jerry that the team would be notified to meet him for the drop-off. The call ended with the user having no further requests.

The user called to inform about a parts delivery but found no one at the location. The agent explained the office hours and offered to notify the team, but the user declined further assistance and ended the call.

Jennifer called to request urgent service for her air conditioner, which is running but not cooling consistently, and she has health concerns related to the heat. The agent documented the issue, prioritized the request, and informed Jennifer that a team member will contact her on the next business day. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further requests.

The user, Jennifer, called to report that her AC, which was previously fixed earlier in the week, is still having the same issue and needs urgent repair due to upcoming hot weather. The agent documented her details, marked the request as urgent, and informed her that a representative will call back on the next business day. The call ended with the user confirming no further assistance was needed.
The user called to schedule a maintenance checkup and provided their ZIP code. The agent attempted to clarify which system the maintenance was for, but the call ended before the user could specify.
The user called to cancel their appointment but then decided to keep it and wait for the appointment. The agent noted the user's preference but could not make changes due to after-hours limitations.

The user called to cancel an appointment at 1016 Camp Town Drive. The agent confirmed the cancellation request and informed the user that the team would follow up on the next business day to confirm the cancellation. The user declined to provide additional details and indicated they would reschedule later.

The user, Homer, called to inquire about a missed warranty service appointment for his air conditioner, which is blowing hot air and not cooling. The agent confirmed the details, scheduled the soonest available appointment for Monday, and noted no special access instructions. Homer also expressed interest in receiving information about maintenance programs.
The user called to inquire about the ETA on a technician. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The transfer was successful.

The user reported an issue with a newly installed AC unit that is blowing air but not cooling. The agent gathered necessary details, confirmed the user's information, and provisionally booked a technician appointment for Tuesday, June 30, 2026. The user declined to provide feedback at the end of the call.
The call was very brief and disconnected almost immediately after the agent's greeting, with no interaction from the user.
The user called and requested to speak with Nicole. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate agent.

Anne Besher called to request an in-depth inspection and estimate for the AC and heat unit at a property she is purchasing. The agent scheduled an appointment for Monday, July 6th at 10 AM and confirmed the details with Anne. The call ended with Anne declining to provide feedback but confirming the appointment.
The user called and requested to speak with someone. The agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent to assist the user further. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The user requested to speak with someone else, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Cordell Ford, called to confirm the ETA of a technician. The agent verified the user's details and informed them that technician Patrick is scheduled to arrive between 2 and 3 PM. The user then requested to speak with a representative, and the call was successfully transferred.

The user called to inquire about the HVAC maintenance plan and expressed frustration about not being contacted previously. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
